use proptest::prelude::*;

fn build_large_index() -> HashMap<String, Vec<String>> {
    // expensive operation: reads files, builds trie, etc.
    let mut index = HashMap::new();
    for entry in std::fs::read_dir("/usr/share/dict").unwrap() {
        let path = entry.unwrap().path();
        let words = std::fs::read_to_string(&path).unwrap();
        for word in words.lines() {
            let key = word.chars().take(3).collect::<String>();
            index.entry(key).or_insert_with(Vec::new).push(word.to_string());
        }
    }
    index
}

proptest! {
    // BAD: expensive fixture recreated for every test case
    #[test]
    fn test_word_lookup(word in "[a-z]{3,20}") {
        let index = build_large_index();
        let key = &word[..3.min(word.len())];
        let results = index.get(key);
        prop_assert!(results.is_some() || true);
    }
}
